reviewsSummary.note: mem-* features cancelled (roadmap placeholders) - not re-reviewed. Only completed memory-* features reviewed.

fixesVerified.description: Fixed pagination bug in recall search - truncate now correctly applied after skip
Fixed repository scoping in get_by_type/get_by_label/get_by_provenance - now filter by repository

blockingIssues.description: Line 125: ExtractionConfig::default() sets store_path to '.skills' but AGENTS.md specifies user-extensible skills should be in '.swell/skills/'. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1.
Line 141: TrajectoryAnalyzer has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute and its store field is never used for database lookups. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1.
Line 955: Confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies (frequency_map.values().sum()) as denominator instead of per-pattern frequency. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1.

Line 1147: Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For input '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. Name starts at index 4. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: CRITICAL SYSTEMIC ISSUE: 4 blocking issues have persisted for 22 rounds without resolution in memory-skill-extraction and memory-pattern-learning. These are well-identified, localized bugs with exact line numbers. Workers follow Rust skill correctly but miss these specific logic bugs that tests don't catch. Recommend: Create explicit fix feature for these 4 specific line-level bugs, or acknowledge these are accepted technical debt.
